name: cost-manager-project
description: Cost Manager RESTful Web Services — four separate processes

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix services/logs-service && npm install --prefix services/users-service && npm install --prefix services/costs-service && npm install --prefix services/about-service
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix services/users-service && npm run test --prefix services/costs-service && npm run test --prefix services/about-service && npm run test --prefix services/logs-service
